chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-609 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on M.A No.10685/2025 (U/A) 2. For order on M.A No.10686/2025 (Return of surety) 11.12.2025 Mr.Imtiaz Ali Abbasi, Advocate for the applicant/surety Mr.Safa Hisbani, A.P.G present in Court in other matters waives notice ********* 1. Granted. 2. Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. Learned counsel for the applicant/surety states that vide Order dated 05.06.2024, the applicants/accused Bilawal Khan and Ali Hassan were granted ad-interim pre-arrest bail by this Court and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. He further stated that vide Order dated 24.06.2024, the bail was dismissed and interim bail earlier granted to the applicants/accused were recalled, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Learned A.P.G after going through the record, tendered her no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
